text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM id="37">
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE lang="de">Eine Tossanische Bibel</TITLE>
    </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1. Added an `id` attribute to the `<ITEM>` tag to provide a unique identifier for the entry.
2. Added a `lang` attribute to the `<TITLE>` tag to specify the language of the title (German, 'de').
3. Fixed the XML structure by ensuring proper indentation for readability and correctness.
4. Removed the erroneous number (37.) from within the `<TITLE>` tag and placed it as an `id` attribute instead."}

parsed.explanation:
1. Added an `id` attribute to the `<ITEM>` tag to provide a unique identifier for the entry.
2. Added a `lang` attribute to the `<TITLE>` tag to specify the language of the title (German, 'de').
3. Fixed the XML structure by ensuring proper indentation for readability and correctness.
4. Removed the erroneous number (37.) from within the `<TITLE>` tag and placed it as an `id` attribute instead.
